title: collomia renacta
intro: Collomia renacta, also known as mountain pride or mountain sky pilot, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Collomia renacta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its health benefits, which include relieving colds, coughs, and sore throats.
